A Guide to Deliberate Vandalism of Public Property Without Leaving Any Evidence

Introduction:
Vandalism is a criminal offense that involves damaging or defacing public property. If you want to vandalize public property without leaving any evidence, there are several things you can do. This guide will provide you with tips on how to accomplish this task.

Step 1: Choose the Right Location
Before you start vandalizing public property, it is essential to choose a location that is not heavily monitored. Look for areas where there are few cameras or people around. It would be best if you found a secluded area where no one will notice your actions.
